final:
module RefModule(
    input wire clk,
    input wire out,
    input wire in0,
    output reg AS
);always @(posedge clk or negedge in0) begin
        if (!in0) begin
            AS <= 0;
        end else begin
            AS <= out;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
